message:
⚠️ Remove old klaude version branches and redirects

- Update latest branch ref: docs/klaude/0.8.1 → docs/kubestellar-mcp/0.8.1
- Remove all old version entries (0.4.0–0.8.0) from shared.json and versions.ts
- Remove backwards-compat /docs/klaude/* redirects from netlify.toml
- Old docs/klaude/* branches deleted from remote

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -280,16 +280,6 @@
   to = "/docs/kubestellar-mcp/overview/introduction"
   status = 302
 
-# Backwards-compat redirects: /docs/klaude/* -> /docs/kubestellar-mcp/*
-[[redirects]]
-  from = "/docs/klaude/*"
-  to = "/docs/kubestellar-mcp/:splat"
-  status = 301
-
-[[redirects]]
-  from = "/docs/klaude"
-  to = "/docs/kubestellar-mcp/overview/introduction"
-  status = 301
 
 [[redirects]]
   from = "/agenda"

@@ -155,59 +155,14 @@
